hindi: माता लक्ष्मी करि कृपा करो अब हमपर। पुरहु सकल मनोरथ हमरे सुंदर॥
english: Mother Lakshmi show your grace upon us now; fulfil all our desires O beautiful one
roman: Mata Lakshmi Kari Kripa Karo Ab Hampar, Purhu Sakal Manorath Hamare Sundar

hindi: जय जय जय लक्ष्मी भवानी। जय जय जय महालक्ष्मी रानी॥
english: Victory to Lakshmi Bhavani; victory to Mahalakshmi the queen
roman: Jai Jai Jai Lakshmi Bhavani, Jai Jai Jai Mahalakshmi Rani

hindi: क्षीर सिंधु में अवतरी माता। पद्म पर बैठी सुख दाता॥
english: Mother descended from the milk ocean; seated on a lotus, giver of happiness
roman: Kshir Sindhu Mein Avatari Mata, Padma Par Baithi Sukh Data

hindi: धन धान्य करहु हे भवानी। शरण आई हम सब प्राणी॥
english: Grant wealth and grain O Bhavani; we creatures have all come to your shelter
roman: Dhan Dhanya Karahu He Bhavani, Sharan Aai Hum Sab Prani

hindi: असंख्य भक्त तुम्हारे गावैं। ऋद्धि सिद्धि सब मिलत पावैं॥
english: Countless devotees sing your praise; they attain all prosperity and powers
roman: Asankhy Bhakt Tumhare Gaven, Riddhi Siddhi Sab Milat Paven

hindi: लक्ष्मी चालीसा जो पढ़े। धन सम्पत्ति के द्वार खुले॥
english: Whoever reads the Lakshmi Chalisa; the doors of wealth and prosperity open for them
roman: Lakshmi Chalisa Jo Padhe, Dhan Sampatti Ke Dwar Khule

hindi: जय जय श्री लक्ष्मी माता। सब जग की सुखदाता॥
english: Victory to Shri Lakshmi Mata; giver of happiness to all the world
roman: Jai Jai Shri Lakshmi Mata, Sab Jag Ki Sukhdata
